title: I tried using AI to improve my trading… turns out it just removed my worst habits
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
I thought AI would give me better entries.

It didn’t.

It just showed me how bad my habits were.

When I looked at my trades:

\- entering too early  

\- trading messy breakouts  

\- ignoring structure  

Nothing “AI” could fix that.

So instead of predicting the market,  

I used AI to filter my behavior.

Simple rules:

\- no clean structure → no trade  

\- no confirmation → no trade  

That’s it.

Performance improved… just by doing less.

The hard part is sticking to it.

So I built a small tool that checks these conditions automatically on charts.

Removes the emotional part.

If you're experimenting with AI in trading, curious what you're building.

Mine is here if you want to see:  

https://herculmarket.com
